use_cases: Landing page header for web applications and marketing sites
Product showcase hero section with integrated navigation
Mobile-responsive app introduction area with hamburger menu
SaaS or fintech landing page entry point with CTA buttons
ai_summary: A comprehensive hero section component featuring an integrated navigation bar with mobile hamburger menu overlay. Includes keyboard navigation support (ESC to close), click-outside detection for dismissing menus, and responsive design with Poppins typography. Uses a grid background pattern and supports desktop and mobile viewing with smooth state management for menu toggling.
